events.title: BRB announces Banco Master acquisition
events.description: BRB's board unanimously approved acquiring 49% of ordinary shares and 100% of preferred shares in Banco Master (58% of total capital) for approximately R$2 billion at 75% of book value.

events.title: BSLI3 +83%, BSLI4 +90% on deal euphoria
events.description: Markets reacted explosively to the BRB/Master deal. BSLI3 surged 83.44% to R$13.74 and BSLI4 rose 90%+, triggering multiple auction halts on B3. BSLI4 set its 52-week high near R$24.50.

events.title: MPF opens investigation; flags hidden liabilities
events.description: The Federal Public Prosecutor's Office opened a formal investigation and warned that BRB must prove the legitimacy and valuation of Master's credit portfolios before proceeding, citing concerns over inflated assets.

events.title: CADE clears deal; court injunction briefly blocks then annulled
events.description: Brazil's antitrust authority CADE approved the acquisition from a competition standpoint. A lower court briefly issued an injunction at prosecutors' request, but it was subsequently annulled and negotiations continued.

events.title: CLDF approves enabling bill 14â€“7; deal awaits only BACEN
events.description: The Federal District Legislative Assembly voted 14â€“7 to authorize BRB to proceed. Governor signed PL 1.882/2025 into law. The only remaining condition was Central Bank approval.

events.title: BACEN formally rejects acquisition
events.description: The Central Bank indeferido (denied) BRB's application to acquire Banco Master. BRB said it had requested the full reasoning to evaluate alternatives.

events.title: BSLI3 âˆ’10.84%, BSLI4 âˆ’11.13% after BACEN veto
events.description: Following BACEN's rejection, BSLI3 fell 10.84% to R$9.41 and BSLI4 dropped 11.13% to R$10.20. At intraday lows both touched âˆ’16%. The Ibovespa rose 0.31% the same session.

events.title: Vorcaro arrested at Guarulhos Airport
events.description: Federal Police arrested Daniel Vorcaro at SÃ£o Paulo's Guarulhos airport as he allegedly attempted to flee to Dubai. Operation Compliance Zero launched simultaneously.

events.title: Banco Master liquidation announced
events.description: The Central Bank of Brazil (BCB) liquidated Banco Master due to a severe liquidity crisis and regulatory violations.
sources: Banco Master collapse Signature Litigation - signaturelitigation.com.md

events.title: BACEN liquidates Banco Master; BRB CEO suspended
events.description: The Central Bank decreed the extrajudicial liquidation of Banco Master â€” Brazil's largest bank fraud at ~R$12 billion. BRB president Paulo Henrique Costa and CFO Dario Garcia were arrested and suspended.

events.title: Vorcaro arrested after liquidation order
events.description: Federal Police arrested Daniel Vorcaro, owner of Banco Master, the day after the bank's liquidation order.
sources: Banco Master collapse Signature Litigation - signaturelitigation.com.md

events.title: BSLI4 closes at R$8.30 post-liquidation
events.description: Following the Banco Master liquidation and arrests, BSLI4 closed at R$8.30, with an intraday range of R$7.70â€“R$8.45, down from R$10+ in previous weeks.

events.title: Second phase: 42 warrants, R$5.7B assets seized
events.description: The second phase of Operation Compliance Zero executed 42 search-and-seizure warrants and seized R$5.7 billion in assets linked to Banco Master and associated entities.

events.title: BRB files capital recapitalization plan with BACEN
events.description: BRB formally submitted a capital restoration plan to the Central Bank, confirming that the R$12.2 billion in fraudulent portfolios had created a material capital shortfall of approximately R$5 billion.

events.title: BRB stock drops 15%
events.description: BSLI4 shares of BRB (Banco de Brasília) dropped more than 15% on this date.

events.title: BSLI4 âˆ’13.42% on capital plan shock; BSLI3 +5%
events.description: BSLI4 plunged more than 20% intraday (touching R$4.47) before closing down 13.42% at R$4.84. Ordinary shares BSLI3 rose 5%+ on expectations the DF government would protect its controlling stake.

events.title: Court freezes R$376M in BRB shares held by fraud suspects
events.description: A DF civil court â€” at BRB's own request â€” ordered the freezing of R$376.4 million in BRB shares belonging to Vorcaro-linked funds and entities including Reag's JoÃ£o Carlos Mansur, who had covertly acquired ~25% of BRB's capital.

events.title: BRB acquires 58% of Banco Master
events.description: The BRB (Banco de Brasília) acquired 58% of Banco Master for approximately R$ 2 billion.
sources: BRB adquire Banco Master, de Daniel Vorcaro - www1.folha.uol.com.br.md

events.title: Vorcaro re-arrested
events.description: Daniel Vorcaro was arrested again due to additional findings beyond financial misconduct.
sources: Banco Master collapse Signature Litigation - signaturelitigation.com.md

events.title: Vorcaro re-arrested â€” third phase, STF jurisdiction
events.description: STF minister AndrÃ© MendonÃ§a authorized Vorcaro's re-arrest on charges extending beyond financial crimes. Evidence included phone messages showing alleged contacts with sitting judges, deputies, and senators since 2022.

events.title: BRB calls for Extraordinary General Meeting
events.description: The BRB called for an Extraordinary General Meeting to discuss a capital increase of up to R$ 8.86 billion.

events.title: BRB proposes R$8.86B equity raise at R$5.29/share
events.description: BRB's extraordinary general meeting authorized a capital increase of up to R$8.86 billion via 1.675 billion new ordinary shares at R$5.29 each â€” a 12.8% premium to market. Subscription rights run through April 22.
